P101.statement: If medical advice is needed, have product container or label at hand

P102.statement: Keep out of reach of children

P103.statement: Read carefully and follow all instructions

P202.statement: Do not handle until all safety precautions have been read and understood

P210.statement: Keep away from heat, hot surfaces, sparks, open flames and other ignition sources. No smoking

P211.statement: Do not spray on an open flame or other ignition source

P212.statement: Avoid heating under confinement or reduction of the desensitizing agent

P220.statement: Keep away from clothing and other combustible materials

P222.statement: Do not allow contact with air

P223.statement: Do not allow contact with water

P231.statement: Handle and store contents under inert gas/...

P240.statement: Ground and bond container and receiving equipment

P243.statement: Take action to prevent static discharges

P244.statement: Keep valves and fittings free from oil and grease

P251.statement: Do not pierce or burn, even after use

P262.statement: Do not get in eyes, on skin, or on clothing

P263.statement: Avoid contact during pregnancy and while nursing

P270.statement: Do not eat, drink or smoke when using this product

P271.statement: Use only outdoors or in a well-ventilated area

P272.statement: Contaminated work clothing should not be allowed out of the workplace

P280.statement: Wear protective gloves/protective clothing/eye protection/face protection

P281.statement: Use personal protective equipment as required

P282.statement: Wear cold insulating gloves and either face shield or eye protection

P283.statement: Wear fire resistant or flame retardant clothing

P284.statement: [In case of inadequate ventilation] wear respiratory protection

P285.statement: In case of inadequate ventilation wear respiratory protection

P312.statement: Call a POISON CENTER/doctor/.../if you feel unwell

P314.statement: Get medical advice/attention if you feel unwell

P320.statement: Specific treatment is urgent (see ... on this label)

P333.statement: If skin irritation or rash occurs:

P334.statement: Immerse in cool water [or wrap in wet bandages]

P335.statement: Brush off loose particles from skin

P336.statement: Thaw frosted parts with lukewarm water. Do not rub affected area

P338.statement: Remove contact lenses, if present and easy to do. Continue rinsing

P340.statement: Remove person to fresh air and keep comfortable for breathing

P351.statement: Rinse cautiously with water for several minutes

P360.statement: Rinse immediately contaminated clothing and skin with plenty of water before removing clothes

P361.statement: Take off immediately all contaminated clothing

P371.statement: In case of major fire and large quantities:

P373.statement: DO NOT fight fire when fire reaches explosives

P374.statement: Fight fire with normal precautions from a reasonable distance

P375.statement: Fight fire remotely due to the risk of explosion

P376.statement: Stop leak if safe to do so

P377.statement: Leaking gas fire: Do not extinguish, unless leak can be stopped safely

P381.statement: In case of leakage, eliminate all ignition sources

P390.statement: Absorb spillage to prevent material damage

P301+P310.statement: IF SWALLOWED: Immediately call a POISON CENTER/doctor/...

P301+P312.statement: IF SWALLOWED: Call a POISON CENTER/doctor/.../if you feel unwell

P301+P330+P331.statement: IF SWALLOWED: Rinse mouth. Do NOT induce vomiting

P302+P334.statement: IF ON SKIN: Immerse in cool water or wrap in wet bandages

P302+P350.statement: IF ON SKIN: Gently wash with plenty of soap and water

P302+P352.statement: IF ON SKIN: Wash with plenty of water/...

P303+P361+P353.statement: IF ON SKIN (or hair): Take off immediately all contaminated clothing. Rinse skin with water [or shower]

P304+P312.statement: IF INHALED: Call a POISON CENTER/doctor/.../if you feel unwell

P304+P340.statement: IF INHALED: Remove person to fresh air and keep comfortable for breathing

P304+P341.statement: IF INHALED: If breathing is difficult, remove person to fresh air and keep comfortable for breathing

P305+P351+P338.statement: IF IN EYES: Rinse cautiously with water for several minutes. Remove contact lenses, if present and easy to do. Continue rinsing

P306+P360.statement: IF ON CLOTHING: Rinse immediately contaminated clothing and skin with plenty of water before removing clothes

P308+P311.statement: IF exposed or concerned: Call a POISON CENTER/doctor/...

P308+P313.statement: IF exposed or concerned: Get medical advice/attention

P332+P313.statement: If skin irritation occurs: Get medical advice/attention

P333+P313.statement: If skin irritation or rash occurs: Get medical advice/attention

P336+P315.statement: Thaw frosted parts with lukewarm water. Do not rub affected area. Get immediate medical advice/attention

P337+P313.statement: If eye irritation persists: Get medical advice/attention

P342+P311.statement: If experiencing respiratory symptoms: Call a POISON CENTER/doctor/...

P361+P364.statement: Take off immediately all contaminated clothing and wash it before reuse

P362+P364.statement: Take off contaminated clothing and wash it before reuse

P370+P376.statement: In case of fire: Stop leak if safe to do so

P370+P378.statement: In case of fire: Use ... to extinguish

P370+P380.statement: In case of fire: Evacuate area

P370+P380+P375.statement: In case of fire: Evacuate area. Fight fire remotely due to the risk of explosion

P371+P380+P375.statement: In case of major fire and large quantities: Evacuate area. Fight fire remotely due to the risk of explosion

P406.statement: Store in corrosive resistant/... container with a resistant inner liner

P407.statement: Maintain air gap between stacks or pallets

P412.statement: Do not expose to temperatures exceeding 50 °C/122 °F

P413.statement: Store bulk masses greater than ... kg/... lbs at temperatures not exceeding ... °C/... °F

P402+P404.statement: Store in a dry place. Store in a closed container

P403+P233.statement: Store in a well-ventilated place. Keep container tightly closed

P403+P235.statement: Store in a well-ventilated place. Keep cool

P410+P403.statement: Protect from sunlight. Store in a well-ventilated place

P410+P412.statement: Protect from sunlight. Do not expose to temperatures exceeding 50 °C/122 °F

P502.statement: Refer to manufacturer or supplier for information on recovery or recycling

P503.statement: Refer to manufacturer/supplier/... for information on disposal/recovery/recycling
